name: ASUS EX-B860M-V5/SI, Intel B860 (LGA 1851) mATX motherboard  PCIe 4.0, two M.2 slots, DDR5, Realtek 2.5Gb Ethernet, SATA 6 Gbps, front USB 5Gbps Type-C®, Luminous anti-moisture coating, Lightning Boot
shortName: ASUS EX-B860M-V5/SI, Intel B860 (LGA 1851) mATX motherboard  PCIe
description: ASUS EX-B860M-V5/SI is a compact mATX motherboard for Intel LGA 1851 processors with DDR5 support and PCIe 4.0 connectivity.
